servinfo.title: Knee Air Bag (Inflator) Module Inspection

ptxt.intxrefpoff: Knee Air Bag (Inflator) Module Removal and Installation

item.ptxt: Never measure resistance of knee air bag (inflator) module. Current from tester can deploy air bag.
Never repair or disassemble air bag (inflator) module.

attention2.ptxt: When handling air bag (inflator) module, be careful not to drop or otherwise give shock to it. If air bag (inflator) module has received shock any way, never attempt its disassembly or repair, but replace the module with a new one.

servinfo.ptxt: Check air bag (inflator) module. Replace air bag (inflator) module if any of the following conditions is found.

item.ptxt: Air bag (inflator) module is deformed or damaged.
Mounting sections of air bag (inflator) module are deformed or damaged.
